description: Maps stable overlay ids to Remotion components and WordToWorkTranscript props. External planners should use these ids and resolve props to the listed composition keys.

exclusivityGroups.note: At most one active; covers main video area.
Center-heavy text; avoid stacking with full_screen_takeover.
Bottom corners; can pair with captions if safe area respected.

overlays.purpose: Elegant centered stack of italic serif topic lines (e.g. three themes).

slots.notes: One string per line, top to bottom. Empty array hides the overlay.

whenToUse: Topic or chapter titles during A-roll or calm B-roll.
whenToAvoid: Busy B-roll where text competes with the shot.
Heavy caption density at the same time.

overlays.purpose: Two-line bold headline with a colored accent bar under the second line.

slots.notes: Second line; underline sits under this line. Both empty hides overlay.

whenToUse: Hook or question-style titles (e.g. line 1 + line 2 payoff).
whenToAvoid: Long sentences; prefer two short lines.

overlays.purpose: Full-frame solid-color promo: uppercase headline lines, optional subtitle, optional pill button; headline animates from top, button from bottom.

slots.notes: Uppercase display; typically 2–4 short lines. Empty allowed if other fields carry the message.
Pill CTA text (e.g. URL). Empty hides button.
CSS color, e.g. #0066cc. Drives button text color for contrast.

whenToAvoid: Talking-head emphasis when the face must stay visible.

overlays.purpose: Left-aligned timeline: header, vertical line animation, stepped rows with icons and labels.

slots.notes: Small caps header (e.g. OUR PROCESS). Empty still allows items if items present.
Empty array hides overlay. icon ∈ graduation | clipboard | edit | envelope.

whenToUse: Explaining steps, services, or journey phases.
When transcript lists sequential benefits or stages.
whenToAvoid: Non-list content; use hero or center title instead.

overlays.purpose: Optional top ‘meet your speaker’ label; two white lower-left bars for name and designation with slide-in from left.

slots.notes: Secondary white bar — title or role. Animates after name.

whenToUse: Introduction or re-introduction of the speaker.
whenToAvoid: When lower third would clash with dense bottom captions (adjust caption variant or timing).

overlays.purpose: Word- or page-aligned captions driven by alignment JSON (not designed marketing text).

slots.notes: URL or public path to word-level alignment JSON.
Highlight / accent for active word styles.

whenToUse: Default accessibility and karaoke sync to speech.
Whenever alignment exists for the segment.
whenToAvoid: Beats where storyboard explicitly disables captions.
Full-screen promo if captions clutter the brief (toggle per segment).
